message:
test: add comprehensive test suites for affinity, ghost, resource, channel, codec, and scheduler subsystems

New test files:
- test_affinity.c: Domain binding, cross-domain violations, transfer
  protocol, table capacity, stale-domain access (bd-hwb.11)
- test_fault_injection.c: Clock anomalies, entropy patterns, allocator
  failures, hook seal violations under deterministic fault injection
- test_ghost.c (core): Protocol monitor transitions, linearity monitor
  double-use and leak detection, ring buffer mechanics, query interface
- test_ghost_borrow.c: Borrow ledger shared/exclusive tracking, conflict
  detection, determinism monitor record/seal/replay/drift (bd-hwb.12)
- test_resource.c: Capacity queries, admission gates, arena exhaustion,
  per-region queries, failure-atomic rollback
- test_safety_profiles.c: Profile query, fault injection trigger
  semantics, fault clear, deterministic replay consistency
- test_codec_equivalence.c: Cross-codec JSON/BIN semantic identity
  verification, field-level diff reporting (bd-2n0.3)
- test_coroutine.c: Protothread poll contract, region-arena captured
  state safety, suspend/resume ordering, budget exhaustion (bd-hwb.10)
- test_ghost.c (runtime): Ghost monitor integration with lifecycle
  operations, violation ring buffer overflow (bd-hwb.5)
- test_scheduler.c: Event sequencing, deterministic ordering, budget
  exhaustion, round tracking, multi-task tie-break, replay identity

Updated test files:
- codec_json_baseline_test.c: Add BIN codec round-trip smoke test;
  update decode calls for new (void*, size_t) signature
- test_codec_json.c: Add 8 new BIN codec tests (round-trip with
  zero-copy view, frame schema mismatch, checksum corruption,
  truncated payload, compactness, big-endian header, unaligned input,
  little-endian length mutation). Replace bin_codec_is_explicitly_
  unsupported with full BIN implementation tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
